summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TuneDrop music distribution platform after auth cookie fix. Backend maintains 100% success rate. Frontend session persistence issue has been RESOLVED - authentication state now properly maintained across navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart rendering warnings about width/height being -1
ui_bugs.symptoms: Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, navigation)
Session persistence across page navigation (FIXED from previous iteration)
Dashboard loads correctly after login with welcome message
Navigation between Dashboard, Releases, Analytics, Wallet, Settings pages
User authentication state maintained across all page navigations
Registration form loads with proper validation
Form validation working (confirm password field validation)
Backend API health check (100% success rate)
All auth API endpoints working correctly
Analytics API endpoint with simulated data
Releases API endpoints with existing test releases
